title: erysimum commatum
intro: Erysimum commatum, also known as Western wallflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. Erysimum commatum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used in herbal remedies.
